title: Serja Kesselrook
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:SerjaKesselrook.jpg]] |name=Serja Kesselrook |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|The Empire is each of us takink our homes, leaving us nothink but to wander. We hop freighters, stow away, get name 'hoboes.'|Serja Kesselrook|}} '''Serja Kesselrook''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] vagabond drifter that lived in an underground community on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Patch-4]]. A refugee who had had his home taken from him by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Kesselrook found a tight-knit community of other "hoboes" on Patch-4, only for his new home to fall under threat by a giant [[watchbeast]] called [[Ceasar]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Kesselrook aided [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leaders [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in calming Ceasar and claiming cargo on the world. ==Biography== {{Quote|In time, we all come here, make friends, decide to stay. And is good home. Little smelly, but is not bad—until crumb-bum Ferret show up!|Serja Kesselrook|}} A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Serja Kesselrook was rendered a [[Refugee/Legends|refugee]] by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] actions during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] that took his home from him. With nowhere to go, Kesselrook became one of a number of beings who got by stowing away on [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]], wandering [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in search for a new place to settle. Eventually he found his way to the garbage [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Patch-4]], joining a large community of so-called "hoboes" that began to build a tight-knit community on the stinking world. Kesselrook settled in well on Patch-4, only for the hoboes' lives to be thrown in turmoil by the arrival of offworld weapons dealer [[Orion Ferret]], who began storing wares on Patch-4 and unleashed his personal [[watchbeast]] [[Ceasar]] to protect his investments. The watchbeast terrorized Kesselrook's community, driving them underground. Although the hoboes worked out that the beast could be controlled by a [[sonic pacifier]] Ferret had access to, they had little means of acquiring it until [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], with the arrival of two [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leaders—[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]—who had worked out a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] deal with Ferret. Betrayed by Ferret and left at the mercy of Ceasar, the Rebels stumbled upon the underground hobo community, where they received an enthusiastic greeting from Kesselrook. Kesselrook informed Skywalker and Calrissian of the existence of the pacifier, allowing the Rebels to calm the beast down and claim their cargo. Skywalker and Calrissian then turned the device over to Kesselrook and the hoboes, giving them back their world. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Go on, get outta here! I'll try to hold this man-eater off!"
"Not havink to say twice, buddy! Let's go!|Lando Calrissian and Serja Kesselrook|}} A large, gregarious and affectionate man who spoke [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] with a thick accent, Serja Kesselrook reveled in the community he had found among his fellow "hoboes" on Patch-4. And although physical confrontation was not his strong suit, Kesselrook provided valuable support to Calrissian and Skywalker during their battle with Ceasar, leading to the hoboes' salvation. ==Behind the scenes== Serja Kesselrook appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' 59]], written by [[David Michelinie]] and illustrated by [[Walter Simonson]], and released in [[1982]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 59}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Humans|Kesselrook, Serja]] [[Category:Males|Kesselrook, Serja]]
